stages.concept:
# Unit 161: 명령문의 화법전환 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **명령문의 화법전환**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 명령문: said → **told/asked/ordered + 목적어 + to부정사**

> 직접: He **said** to me, "**Open** the window."
> 간접: He **told** me **to open** the window.
> 그는 나에게 창문을 열라고 말했다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **부정 명령문**: → **not to + 동사원형**

> 직접: She **said**, "**Don't** touch it."
> 간접: She **told** me **not to touch** it.
> 그녀는 나에게 그것을 만지지 말라고 말했다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 전달동사는 상황에 따라 달라요:

| 전달동사 | 의미 |
|------|------|
| told | ~에게 …하라고 말했다 |
| asked | ~에게 …해달라고 요청했다 |
| ordered | ~에게 …하라고 명령했다 |
| advised | ~에게 …하라고 충고했다 |

> 직접: The doctor **said**, "Take this medicine."
> 간접: The doctor **advised** me **to take** the medicine.

> 직접: The officer **said**, "Stop the car."
> 간접: The officer **ordered** me **to stop** the car.

**Q. 다음 직접화법 문장을 간접화법으로 바르게 변환한 것을 고르세요.**
직접화법: The teacher said to him, "Don't run in the hallway." (선생님이 그에게 말했다, "복도에서 뛰지 마라.")
1. The teacher told him to run in the hallway.
2. The teacher told him not to run in the hallway. ✅
3. The teacher told him don't run in the hallway.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 훌륭해요! 선생님이 명령하신 내용이 '뛰지 마라'는 부정 명령문이므로, 목적격 보어로 부정의 to부정사인 'not to run'을 사용해야 합니다. 

🧑‍🎓 학생: 명령문은 to부정사로! 부정은 not to! 전달동사도 상황에 맞게 골라야겠어요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 161: 명령문의 화법전환 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 직접화법을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
He said to me, "Open the window."
→ He (     ) me to open the window.
> **정답** told (asked)

---

**02.** She said to him, "Don't be late."
→ She told him (     ) to be late.
> **정답** not

---

**03.** The teacher said to us, "Study hard."
→ The teacher told us (     ) study hard.
> **정답** to

---

**04.** He said to me, "Please help me."
→ He (     ) me to help him.
> **정답** asked

---

**05.** She said to him, "Don't open the box."
→ She told him (     ) open the box.
> **정답** not to

---

**06.** 직접화법을 간접화법으로 바꾸시오.
He said to me, "Close the door."
> **정답** He told me to close the door.

---

**07.** She said to him, "Don't run in the hall."
> **정답** She told him not to run in the hall.

---

**08.** The teacher said to us, "Be quiet."
> **정답** The teacher told us to be quiet.

---

**09.** He said to me, "Please pass me the salt."
> **정답** He asked me to pass him the salt.

---

**10.** She said to him, "Don't worry."
> **정답** She told him not to worry.

---

**11.** 간접화법을 직접화법으로 바꾸시오.
He told me to sit down.
> **정답** He said to me, "Sit down."

---

**12.** She told him not to touch it.
> **정답** She said to him, "Don't touch it."

---

**13.** The teacher told us to read the book.
> **정답** The teacher said to us, "Read the book."

---

**14.** He asked me to help him.
> **정답** He said to me, "Please help me."

---

**15.** She told him not to make noise.
> **정답** She said to him, "Don't make noise."

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그는 나에게 문을 닫으라고 말했다. (간접화법)
He me told to close the door
> **정답** He / told / me / to / close / the / door

---

**17.** 그녀는 그에게 뛰지 말라고 말했다. (간접화법)
She him told not to run
> **정답** She / told / him / not / to / run

---

**18.** 선생님은 우리에게 조용히 하라고 말했다. (간접화법)
The teacher us told to be quiet
> **정답** The / teacher / told / us / to / be / quiet

---

**19.** 그는 나에게 도와달라고 부탁했다. (간접화법)
He me asked to help him
> **정답** He / asked / me / to / help / him

---

**20.** 그녀는 그에게 걱정하지 말라고 말했다. (간접화법)
She him told not to worry
> **정답** She / told / him / not / to / worry
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 161: 명령문의 화법전환 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이
바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
My mother said to me, "Finish cleaning your room by
7:00."
→ My mother _______ me _____________ cleaning
my room by 7:00.
order - finish
said to - to finish
told - finish
told - to finish
> **정답** told - to finish

---

**02.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이
바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The doctor said to me, "Don't eat too much sugar."
→ The doctor ____________ me ________________
too much sugar.
told - do not eat
advised - to not eat
told - to eat
advised - not to eat
> **정답** advised - not to eat

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이
바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The officer said to his men, "Stop shooting."
→ The officer ___________ his men ____________
shooting.
told - stop
ordered - stop
ordered - not to stop
ordered - to stop
> **정답** ordered - to stop

---

**04.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이
바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
My teacher said to us, "Finish the book by tomorrow."
→ My teacher _________ us __________ the book by
____________.
told - to finish - the next day
said to - to finish - the next day
said to - finish - tomorrow
told - finish - the next day
> **정답** told - to finish - the next day

---

**05.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 틀린
곳을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
He said to her, "Put your bag on the table."
→ He said to her put your bag on the table.
told - to put - her
told - to put - your
said to - to put - her
said to - to put - your
> **정답** told - to put - her

---

**06.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 틀린
곳을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
My mom says to me, "Don't watch TV so late at night."
→ My mom says to me do not watch TV so late at
night.
told - not watch
tells - not to watch
tells - to not watch
says to - not to watch
> **정답** tells - not to watch

---

**07.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 틀린
곳을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
She said to us, "Tell him what we did."
→ She said to us to tell him what we did.
said - have done
told - did
told - had done
said - had done
> **정답** told - had done

---

**08.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 틀린
곳을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
He said to me, "Watch out while you are driving."
→ He advised me watch out while I am driving.
said to - to watch out - was
told - to watch out - am
advised - watch out - was
advised - to watch out - was
> **정답** advised - to watch out - was

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
아버지는 내게 말씀하셨다. "항상 정직해라."
My father said me, "To be honest all the time."
My father told me, "Be honest all the time."
My father said me, "Be honest all the time."
My father said to me, "Be honest all the time."
> **정답** My father said to me, "Be honest all the time."

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 내 아들에게 일찍 자라고 말했다.
I told my son to go to bed early.
I said to my son to go to bed early.
I told my son go to bed early.
I told my son that he went to bed early.
> **정답** I told my son to go to bed early.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 그녀에게 그것에 대해 걱정하지 말라고 말했다.
I told her to not worry about it.
I told her not to worry about it.
I said to her to not worry about it.
I told her to worry about it.
> **정답** I told her not to worry about it.

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
우리 선생님은 나에게 문법을 공부하는 데 더 많은 시간을
쓰라고 충고하셨다.
My teacher advised me to spend more time
studying grammar.
My teacher said to me to spend more time
studying grammar.
My teacher advised to me to spend more time
studying grammar.
My teacher said me to spend more time
studying grammar.
> **정답** My teacher advised me to spend more time studying
grammar.

---

**13.** 다음 중 화법 전환이 잘못된 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
She said to him, "Don't be mad at me."
→ She told him not to be mad at her.
She said to me, "Leave here before 5 pm."
→ She told me leave there before 5 pm.
He said to her, "Brush your teeth three times a
day."
→ He told her to brush her teeth three times a
day.
He said to her, "Please give these flowers to
your sister."
→ He asked her give those flowers to her
sister.
> **정답** He said to her, "Please give these flowers to your
sister." → He asked her give those flowers to her
sister., She said to me, "Leave here before 5 pm." →
She told me leave there before 5 pm.

---

**14.** 다음 중 화법 전환이 잘못된 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
He said to her, "Don't miss the class
tomorrow."
→ He ordered her not to miss the class the
next day.
He said to her, "Solve this problem in different
ways."
→ He suggested to have solved that problem
in different ways.
She said to me, "Please be well prepared for
the test."
→ She asked me being well prepared for the
test.
She said to him, "Make sure to call me as soon
as you arrive there."
→ She told him to make sure to call her as
soon as he arrived there.
> **정답** She said to me, "Please be well prepared for the
test." → She asked me being well prepared for the
test., He said to her, "Solve this problem in different
ways." → He suggested to have solved that problem
in different ways.

---

**15.** 다음 중 화법 전환이 바르게 된 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
Her friend said to her, "Don't eat too much
chocolate."
→ Her friend advised to not eat too much
chocolate.
He said to me, "Don't be jealous of her
success."
→ He advised me not to be jealous of her
success.
He said to her, "Don't give up persuading your
parents."
→ He advised her don't give up persuading
her parents.
She said to me, "Please send this document to
David today."
→ She asked me to send that document to
David that day.
> **정답** He said to me, "Don't be jealous of her success." →
He advised me not to be jealous of her success., She
said to me, "Please send this document to David
today." → She asked me to send that document to
David that day.

---

**16.** 다음 중 화법 전환이 바르게 된 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
She said, "He didn't come here."
→ She said that he hadn't gone there.
He asked me, "Where did you buy your car?"
→ He asked me where I did buy my car.
He asked me, "Have you worked before?"
→ He asked me if I have worked before.
I say to my son, "Treat older people with
respect."
→ I tell my son to treat older people with
respect.
> **정답** I say to my son, "Treat older people with respect." →
I tell my son to treat older people with respect., She
said, "He didn't come here." → She said that he
hadn't gone there.

---

**17.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 틀린 곳을 고쳐 쓰시오.
My father said to me, "Don't play the guitar after 7
p.m."
→ My father told me
to not play the guitar after
7 p.m.
> **정답** told, me, not to play

---

**18.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 틀린 곳을 고쳐 쓰시오.
He said to her, "Don't be too confident of
yourself."
→ He advised her
to be too confident
of yourself.
> **정답** advised, her, not to be, herself

---

**19.** 다음 문장을 직접화법으로 바꿀 때 틀린 곳을 고쳐 쓰시오.
She asked me to help her.
→ She said to me, "Please
to help her."
> **정답** said to, me, help, me

---

**20.** 다음 문장을 직접화법으로 바꿀 때 틀린 곳을 고쳐 쓰시오.
He told her to be careful not to catch a cold.
He said her, "To be
careful not to catch a cold."
> **정답** said to, Be, not, to catch
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 161 명령문의 화법전환중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 다음 문장을 간접화법으로
바꾸시오.
He said to me, "Please don't feel bad about his
joke." [ask]
→ He  (     ) .
정답 asked me not to feel bad about his joke

---

**02.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 다음 문장을 간접화법으로
바꾸시오.
He said to her, "You must hand in your report."
[order]
→ He  (     ) .
정답 ordered her to hand in her report

---

**03.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 다음 문장을 간접화법으로
바꾸시오.
He said to me, "Please don't take your eyes off the
baby." [ask]
→ He  (     ) .
정답 asked me not to take my eyes off the baby

---

**04.** 다음 문장을 직접화법으로 바꾸시오.
The nurse advised me to take my medicine after
meals.
→ The nurse said to me, "
."
정답 Take your medicine after meals

---

**05.** 다음 문장을 직접화법으로 바꾸시오.
The coast guard advised me not to swim too far off
the beach.
→ The coast guard said to me, "
."
정답 Don't swim too far off the beach

---

**06.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 괄호 안의 말을 이용하여
문장을 완성하시오. (간접화법)
그가 나에게 그의 집에서 차 한잔 하자고 요청했다.
힌트 (     ) ask, have tea
He  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  at his
house.
정답 asked, me, to, have, tea

---

**07.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 괄호 안의 말을 이용하여
문장을 완성하시오. (간접화법)
나는 그에게 거기서 잠시 기다리라고 말했다.
힌트 (     ) tell, wait
I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  for a minute.
정답 told, him, to, wait, there

---

**08.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 괄호 안의 말을 이용하여
문장을 완성하시오. (직접화법)
그 장교는 병사들에게 말했다. "내 지시 없이는 사격하지
마라."
힌트 (     ) shoot, without, order
The officer said to the soldiers, "  (     )  
  (     )   (     ) ."
정답 Don't, shoot, without, my, order

---

**09.** 다음 화법전환에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 문장을 완성하시오.
The mechanic said to the customer, "Change the
engine oil next month."
→ The mechanic advised the customer
change the engine oil (     )  the following
month.
정답 to change the engine oil

---

**10.** 다음 화법전환에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 문장을 완성하시오.
He said to her, "Don't talk back and do as you are
told."
→ He told her  (     ) do not talk back
and do as she was told.
정답 not to talk back

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 161: 명령문의 화법전환 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
My teacher said to me, "Finish writing your essay by 5:00." → My teacher _______ me _____________ writing my essay by 5:00. order - finish said to - to finish told - finish told - to finish
> 정답: told - to finish

---

**02.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The dentist said to me, "Don't eat too many sweets." → The dentist ____________ me ________________ too many sweets. told - do not eat advised - to not eat told - to eat advised - not to eat
> 정답: advised - not to eat

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The coach said to his team, "Stop running." → The coach ___________ his team ____________ running. told - stop ordered - stop ordered - not to stop ordered - to stop
> 정답: ordered - to stop

---

**04.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
My teacher said to us, "Read the article by tomorrow." → My teacher _________ us __________ the article by ____________. told - to read - the next day said to - to read - the next day said to - read - tomorrow told - read - the next day
> 정답: told - to read - the next day

---

**05.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 틀린 곳을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
She said to him, "Put your coat on the chair." → She said to him put your coat on the chair. told - to put - his told - to put - your said to - to put - his said to - to put - your
> 정답: told - to put - his

---

**06.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 틀린 곳을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
My dad says to me, "Don't play video games so late at night." → My dad says to me do not play video games so late at night. told - not play tells - not to play tells - to not play says to - not to play
> 정답: tells - not to play

---

**07.** 다음 문장을 간접화법으로 바꿀 때 밑줄 친 부분 중 틀린 곳을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
He said to us, "Tell her what we saw." → He said to us to tell her what we saw. said - have seen told - saw told - had seen said - had seen
